run_now.name: Run now
run_now.description: Trigger an immediate opening or closing of the configured shutters, bypassing day, randomization and presence conditions.

action.name: Action
action.description: Whether to open or close the shutters.

pause.name: Pause
pause.description: Pause the simulation. Scheduled triggers are ignored until resumed.

resume.name: Resume
resume.description: Resume the simulation after a pause.
